title: copy(community): tighten subtitle and unstyle pollen-beta link
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Trimming the hedges
gist.blurb: We gave the Community page a quick trim, tightening up the subtitle and making the Discord links blend in a bit better.
gist.summary: Updated the Community page copy for brevity and simplified the styling of the Discord channel links.
gist.impact: Users will see a cleaner, more streamlined Community page with less visual clutter.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot doing some light gardening/trimming on a community notice board or sign, representing the 'tightening' of copy and removal of the yellow chip styling.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully trimming a small vine around a wooden community notice board. A chunky pixel robot companion holds a small pair of clippers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully trimming a small vine around a wooden community notice board.
